description:
Use Epi Info 7 StatCalc to determine the required sample sizes for three survey scenarios. 

Scenario A: Population 250,000, Expected Frequency 15%, Margin of Error 5%, Design Effect 1.0, Clusters 1, Confidence Level 95%.
Scenario B: Population 5,000, Expected Frequency 50%, Margin of Error 3%, Design Effect 1.0, Clusters 1, Confidence Level 95%.
Scenario C: Population 12,000, Expected Frequency 85%, Margin of Error 3%, Design Effect 2.0, Clusters 1, Confidence Level 99%.

Record the results in a text file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\survey_sample_sizes.txt in the following format:
Survey A Sample Size: [value]
Survey B Sample Size: [value]
Survey C Sample Size: [value]
